seoTitle: Thora vs Thornleigh — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Thora and Thornleigh. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thora and Thornleigh.
heading: Thora vs Thornleigh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thora, New South Wales and Thornleigh, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thornleigh has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Thora (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thora or Thornleigh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thora has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Thornleigh scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thora scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Thornleigh scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thora or Thornleigh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thornleigh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
